name: HR teams in tech startups using Greenhouse for hiring tool
description: For HR teams in tech startups processing 5–15 new hires/month, inefficient onboarding causes delays in new hire productivity. We provide an onboarding checklist generator instead of manual onboarding checklists and spreadsheets.
target_audience: HR teams in tech startups using Greenhouse for hiring
problem_solved: Inefficient onboarding processes leading to delays in new hire productivity.
